expected_curve: monotone increasing in POLLUTION_SOURCES (lacks-I2S advantage grows)

acceptance.rule: at POLLUTION_SOURCES=0 the I2S-lacking and I2S-carrying fuzzers are comparable (naive ≈ cmplog, value_profile ≈ value_profile_cmplog); as POLLUTION_SOURCES grows the I2S-lacking fuzzers (naive, value_profile) increasingly beat the I2S-carrying ones (cmplog, value_profile_cmplog), with the largest gap at POLLUTION_SOURCES=16. Conservative: a clear non-decreasing lacks_axis - has_axis gap across the grid suffices; identical counts at every dose ⇒ inconclusive (harness failed to expose the pollution dynamic).

design_basis: The structural 8-byte gate is equally reachable by all fuzzers (pure byte search). POLLUTION_SOURCES scales how many unrelated 2-byte literal operands flood the CmpLogObserver; I2SRandReplace then scans the whole input for those byte runs and splices them, frequently corrupting the structural window. More sources ⇒ more per-execution corruption of the window ⇒ the I2S-carrying fuzzers (cmplog, vpc) waste budget while the I2S-lacking fuzzers (naive, value_profile) explore the window undisturbed. The knob therefore scales the I2S DISADVANTAGE, matching the anti-family direction.
notes: POLLUTION_SOURCES=0: pollution loop compiled out; no operand source for I2S, so all four fuzzers should perform comparably on the bare 8-byte structural gate (baseline / null dose).
POLLUTION_SOURCES=2: light pollution; small or no separation expected.
POLLUTION_SOURCES=8: I2S substitutions land in the structural window often enough that cmplog/vpc lose ground to naive/value_profile.
POLLUTION_SOURCES=16: maximum competing operands; widest gap, I2S-lacking fuzzers should dominate.

expected_direction names the cluster's primary decisive pair (naive>cmplog, both with and without value_profile). The value_profile>value_profile_cmplog pair (members harfbuzz_9463, openthread_8518) is the same I2S axis and is expected to stratify the same way.
